page.title: Astondoa 40 'Fufi': Best Boat in Marbella for Couples and small groups (up to 9)

data.meta_description: Astondoa 40 'Fufi' best for couples and small groups up to 9 in Marbella. €749/2h with skipper, drinks & VAT. Book your Puerto Banús charter now.
data.summary: The Astondoa 40 'Fufi' is the ideal Marbella charter boat for couples and small groups up to 9, offering a great balance of style, space, and value from Puerto Banús. Priced from €749 for 2 hours with all inclusions, it's a top choice for a luxurious day on the Costa del Sol.
key_facts: From €749 for 2 hours to €2,299 for 8 hours
Includes licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% VAT
Suitable for couples, small group outings, and sunset cruises
Open layout with sun pad and saloon for relaxing on the water

faq.q: What is the price to charter the Astondoa 40 'Fufi'?
faq.a: The Astondoa 40 'Fufi' is priced from €749 for 2 hours, €1,199 for 4 hours, €1,699 for 6 hours, and €2,299 for 8 hours. All prices include a licensed skipper, fuel, soft drinks, beer, cava, white wine, light snacks, insurance, and Spanish VAT (21%).

faq.q: How many people can the Astondoa 40 'Fufi' accommodate?
faq.a: The Astondoa 40 'Fufi' has a maximum capacity of 9 passengers. This makes it ideal for couples, small families, or groups of friends looking for an intimate yet spacious charter experience from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: What is included in the charter of the Astondoa 40?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden extras.

faq.q: Where does the Astondoa 40 'Fufi' depart from?
faq.a: The Astondoa 40 'Fufi' departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella's famous luxury marina. You can easily reach it from the Golden Mile, Marbella town, or nearby resorts like Estepona and Sotogrande.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food or extra drinks on board?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and additional drinks. The boat provides a standard selection of drinks and snacks, but you can customise your menu. Just let us know in advance if you need a cooler or extra storage.

faq.q: Is the Astondoa 40 suitable for a sunset cruise?
faq.a: Absolutely. The Astondoa 40 'Fufi' is one of the best boats for sunset cruises in Marbella. Its open bow area and saloon provide perfect views of the coastline as the sun sets behind La Concha mountain.

faq.q: What destinations can we visit with the Astondoa 40?
faq.a: Popular routes include cruising along the Marbella coastline to Cabopino, Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, or further to Estepona. The skipper will suggest the best spots based on sea conditions and your preferences.

faq.q: How do I book the Astondoa 40 'Fufi'?
faq.a: You can book directly via WhatsApp through our website. We'll confirm availability and send you a booking link. A deposit is required to secure the date, with the balance paid on the day.

data.body_html:
If you're looking for the Astondoa 40 'Fufi' best for couples and small groups in Marbella, this 12.5-metre motor yacht from Puerto Banús delivers style, comfort, and great value. Priced from €749 for 2 hours (all inclusive), it's the perfect balance of luxury and affordability for up to 9 passengers. Whether you're celebrating an anniversary, enjoying a day with friends, or simply soaking up the Costa del Sol sun, 'Fufi' offers a private, hassle-free charter experience without the big-group price tag.

Why the Astondoa 40 'Fufi' is the best choice for couples and small groups

Many charter boats in Marbella cater to large parties, but the Astondoa 40 'Fufi' is designed for those who want an intimate yet spacious day on the water. With a capacity of just 9 passengers, you'll never feel crowded. The open bow area features a generous sun pad for lounging, while the aft cockpit has a dining table and seating for everyone. Inside, the saloon offers shade and a sofa area — perfect for escaping the midday heat. The skipper handles all navigation, so you can relax with a cold drink and take in the views of La Concha, the Golden Mile, and the glitzy Puerto Banús skyline.

Pricing and inclusions — no hidden costs

Chartering the Astondoa 40 'Fufi' is straightforward. Prices are all-inclusive, so you know exactly what you're paying. Choose from these durations:

  • 2 hours — €749
  • 4 hours — €1,199
  • 6 hours — €1,699
  • 8 hours — €2,299

Every booking includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no extra charges for cleaning, mooring, or tips. You can bring your own food and extra drinks if you wish. For full details on what's included, visit our Boat Rental Marbella homepage.

What to expect on your charter from Puerto Banús

Your trip begins at Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic marina. After a brief welcome from the skipper, you'll cruise west along the coast. Popular stops include Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés — two quiet coves with crystal-clear water ideal for swimming. The skipper knows the best anchorages depending on wind and swell. If you prefer a longer trip, head towards Estepona or Sotogrande. The 12.5-metre hull handles well in moderate seas, and the Volvo Penta engines provide a smooth ride at cruising speeds around 20 knots. You'll also pass landmarks like the Marbella Marina and the luxurious villas of the Golden Mile.

How the Astondoa 40 compares to other boats in our fleet

While the Astondoa 40 'Fufi' is our best option for small groups, you may also consider:

  • Azimut 39 — similar size and price (€749/2h) but sleeps 11 pax. Slightly larger cockpit.
  • Fairline Targa 12m — also 12m, 10 pax, but pricing on request. More sporty layout.
  • Bandido — 11.5m, 8 pax, pricing on request. A more classic motor yacht feel.

For larger parties, check out our Mangusta 80 guide which accommodates up to 12 guests with a free jet ski included.

Best times to charter the Astondoa 40 'Fufi'

The Marbella season runs from April to October, with peak conditions in July and August when sea temperatures reach 24-26°C. For a quieter experience, book a morning slot (10:00-14:00) or a sunset cruise (18:00-22:00) in May, June, or September. The boat is also available for evening charters — the lights of Puerto Banús and the backdrop of La Concha make for a memorable night out. If you're planning a special occasion like a proposal or anniversary, let us know; we can arrange flowers, champagne, or a custom menu.

How to book the Astondoa 40 'Fufi'

Booking is simple. Contact us via WhatsApp through our website to check availability for your preferred date. We'll send you a secure payment link for a deposit (usually 50%), and the balance is paid on the day. Because 'Fufi' is a popular boat, especially on weekends, we recommend booking at least a week in advance. For last-minute availability, message us directly. You can also browse other options on our Boat Rental Marbella fleet page.

Frequently asked questions

What is the price to charter the Astondoa 40 'Fufi'?

The Astondoa 40 'Fufi' is priced from €749 for 2 hours, €1,199 for 4 hours, €1,699 for 6 hours, and €2,299 for 8 hours. All prices include a licensed skipper, fuel, soft drinks, beer, cava, white wine, light snacks, insurance, and Spanish VAT (21%).

How many people can the Astondoa 40 'Fufi' accommodate?

The Astondoa 40 'Fufi' has a maximum capacity of 9 passengers. This makes it ideal for couples, small families, or groups of friends looking for an intimate yet spacious charter experience from Puerto Banús.

What is included in the charter of the Astondoa 40?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden extras.

Where does the Astondoa 40 'Fufi' depart from?

The Astondoa 40 'Fufi' departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella's famous luxury marina. You can easily reach it from the Golden Mile, Marbella town, or nearby resorts like Estepona and Sotogrande.

Can I bring my own food or extra drinks on board?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and additional drinks. The boat provides a standard selection of drinks and snacks, but you can customise your menu. Just let us know in advance if you need a cooler or extra storage.

Is the Astondoa 40 suitable for a sunset cruise?

Absolutely. The Astondoa 40 'Fufi' is one of the best boats for sunset cruises in Marbella. Its open bow area and saloon provide perfect views of the coastline as the sun sets behind La Concha mountain.

What destinations can we visit with the Astondoa 40?

Popular routes include cruising along the Marbella coastline to Cabopino, Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, or further to Estepona. The skipper will suggest the best spots based on sea conditions and your preferences.

How do I book the Astondoa 40 'Fufi'?

You can book directly via WhatsApp through our website. We'll confirm availability and send you a booking link. A deposit is required to secure the date, with the balance paid on the day.
